achievements.title: Tale of the Crypt Key
achievements.description: Collect the Front Door Key... you probably should have just left it under the mat
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Gomez Scared Stupid
achievements.description: Collect the first potion ingredient... it has to be this specific Bone
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Who Goes There?
achievements.description: Rescue Thing... he can really take a beating
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Chucky's Brides
achievements.description: Collect the Wooden Key... you'll just have to let yourself in
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Idle Hands
achievements.description: Collect the Snorkel for a slightly safer dive
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Little Shop of Horrors
achievements.description: Collect the Umbrella and now it's time to make like Santa Claus
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Don't Kill It
achievements.description: Catch the deadly rug in the Bear Trap
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: The Boogie Man Will Help You
achievements.description: Play a little Anxiety Tango for me
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: A Bucket Without Blood
achievements.description: Collect the Empty Bucket, an important kitchen utensil
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Psycho Filler
achievements.description: Fill the Empty Bucket with the only working tap in the house
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Private Parts
achievements.description: Find a secret place, but don't get burned
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Dead and Loving It
achievements.description: Collect an Extra Life that is looking a bit smug
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Nightmare Sisters
achievements.description: Rescue poor Wednesday... she's as cold as ice and frozen stiff
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Dead Heat
achievements.description: Thaw out Wednesday's personality and collect the Attic Key
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Stepmonster
achievements.description: Rescue Grandma, the master mechanic
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Bad Taste
achievements.description: Collect the second potion ingredient, a Blue Egg... fresh from the nest
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Texas Chainsaw Machine Repair
achievements.description: Collect the Wrench so Grandma can get to work
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: The Stuff
achievements.description: Collect the third potion ingredient... the potion needs just a hint of fog
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: High Spirits
achievements.description: Cross the roof and collect the Fog with all 3 Thing Shields remaining
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: People Inside the Chute
achievements.description: Help Puglsey lose a little weight so he can escape the chute, but try not to overdo it
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Cara Mia...
achievements.description: Rescue Morticia and dance in the twilight
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Haunted Honeymoon
achievements.description: Rescue Morticia without using a continue
achievements.author: FernandoFFS
